item.title: ~/.clawhq/ deployment directory migration
item.intent: Replace all hardcoded ~/.openclaw/ paths with configurable ~/.clawhq/ deployment root. Existing installations must migrate without data loss.
item.description: USER VALUE: Internal path migration — replaces hardcoded ~/.openclaw/ with configurable ~/.clawhq/. User-invisible refactor. Does not block MVP. Do after install scaffold (CQ-014) is working.
steps: Make deployment root configurable via clawhq.yaml
Replace all hardcoded ~/.openclaw/ paths with configurable root
Implement migration command for existing installations
acceptanceCriteria: Configurable deployment root respected throughout codebase
Migration command moves existing data without loss
